'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=98d12SZSU3tBeRkXJqRhnZKRkiuuJG74ozGUw6EJtAU-1773039633-1.0.1.1-uRw5ni0pM45SI3eV3p0FP.EMCfA4Cfc_Buud25VfQ_I"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
